elements.title: lang::report_page_062_title::local_kopere_bi
elements.commandsql:
SELECT kbi_slot.id                AS id,
       kbi_c.id                   AS courseid,
       kbi_c.fullname             AS course,
       kbi_cm.id                  AS cmid,
       kbi_qz.id                  AS quizid,
       kbi_qz.name                AS quiz_name,
       kbi_slot.slot,
       kbi_slot.page              AS slot_page,
       kbi_slot.maxmark,
       kbi_qbe.id                 AS questionbankentryid,
       kbi_qv.version,
       kbi_q.id                   AS questionid,
       kbi_q.name                 AS question_name,
       kbi_q.qtype,
       kbi_q.defaultmark,
       kbi_q.length,
       kbi_q.status               AS question_status,
       kbi_tags.tags              AS question_tags
FROM mdl_quiz kbi_qz
       JOIN mdl_course kbi_c ON kbi_c.id = kbi_qz.course
       JOIN mdl_modules kbi_m ON kbi_m.name = 'quiz'
       JOIN mdl_course_modules kbi_cm ON kbi_cm.course = kbi_c.id AND kbi_cm.module = kbi_m.id AND kbi_cm.instance = kbi_qz.id
       JOIN mdl_quiz_slots kbi_slot ON kbi_slot.quizid = kbi_qz.id
       LEFT JOIN mdl_question_references kbi_qr ON kbi_qr.component = 'mod_quiz'
             AND kbi_qr.questionarea = 'slot'
             AND kbi_qr.itemid = kbi_slot.id
       LEFT JOIN mdl_question_bank_entries kbi_qbe ON kbi_qbe.id = kbi_qr.questionbankentryid
       LEFT JOIN mdl_question_versions kbi_qv ON kbi_qv.questionbankentryid = kbi_qbe.id
             AND (
                 kbi_qv.version = kbi_qr.version
                 OR (kbi_qr.version IS NULL AND kbi_qv.version = (
                     SELECT MAX(kbi_qv2.version)
                     FROM mdl_question_versions kbi_qv2
                     WHERE kbi_qv2.questionbankentryid = kbi_qbe.id
                 ))
             )
       LEFT JOIN mdl_question kbi_q ON kbi_q.id = kbi_qv.questionid
       LEFT JOIN (
             SELECT kbi_ti.itemid,
                    GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT kbi_t.rawname ORDER BY kbi_t.rawname SEPARATOR ', ') AS tags
             FROM mdl_tag_instance kbi_ti
                    JOIN mdl_tag kbi_t ON kbi_t.id = kbi_ti.tagid
             WHERE kbi_ti.itemtype = 'question'
             GROUP BY kbi_ti.itemid
       ) kbi_tags ON kbi_tags.itemid = kbi_q.id
WHERE kbi_c.visible = 1
  AND kbi_cm.visible = 1
ORDER BY kbi_c.fullname, kbi_qz.name, kbi_slot.slot
